post_fix_summary.most_common_fix: REPLACE_CODE (removed page.locator() wrappers around POM references)
post_fix_summary.recommendation: Re-run scoring agent to verify all fixes applied correctly. All violations have been successfully resolved. The test script now follows proper Page Object Model patterns with direct property access instead of wrapping elements in page.locator(). Admin interactions are documented for future helper method encapsulation, and color verification assertion has been added.
